dt-example.title: Events - DataTables
dt-example.info:
DataTables fires [a number of custom events](https://datatables.net/reference/event/) which you can bind to using either the `-init on` initialisation property and / or the `-api on()` API method.
This example shows the use of the `-event order`and `-event search` events being listened for through `-init on`, and `-event page` being listened for through jQuery. The action for each event is to show a small notification in the document that the event has indeed been fired.
Please note, if you to listen for a DataTables event using [`$().on()`](https://api.jquery.com/on/) (rather than using the DataTables `-api on()` method), you need to add the `.dt` namespace to the event name. This is shown on the `-event page` in this example.
